title: DHCP scope exhaustion

servicenow_seed.short_description: [TRAINING] New devices cannot get IP addresses
servicenow_seed.description: Several users in training room get 169.254.x.x addresses. Existing users on the same Wi-Fi still work.

correct_steps: Confirm APIPA address on affected machines
Check if existing devices still have leases
Check DHCP scope utilization if tool is available
rationale: APIPA on multiple new devices points to DHCP scope exhaustion or relay issue.
